projectDescription: Mathlib is the comprehensive mathematical library for the Lean 4 theorem prover, covering algebra, analysis, topology, number theory, category theory, and hundreds of other mathematical domains, along with a rich collection of proof tactics.
keyFeatures: 8000+ Lean 4 modules spanning all major mathematical domains
Rich tactic library including `linarith`, `ring`, `norm_num`, `simp`, `omega`, `positivity`, `abel`, `field_simp`, and more
Algebraic structures: groups, rings, fields, modules, algebras, and their morphisms
Analysis: metric spaces, topological spaces, calculus, measure theory, Fourier analysis
Number theory: primes, modular arithmetic, p-adic numbers, algebraic number theory
Category theory: functors, natural transformations, adjunctions, limits, sheaves
Precompiled `.olean` cache via `lake exe cache get` for fast builds
Automated CI, linters, and style enforcement
Active community on Zulip with extensive maintainer network
publicApiSurface: Mathlib.Tactic.Abel — abel tactic for additive commutative monoids/groups
Mathlib.Tactic.Linarith — linarith tactic for linear arithmetic over ordered fields
Mathlib.Tactic.Ring — ring/ring_nf tactics for commutative (semi)rings
Mathlib.Tactic.NormNum — norm_num tactic for numeric normalization
Mathlib.Tactic.Positivity — positivity tactic for non-negativity/positivity goals
Mathlib.Tactic.FieldSimp — field_simp tactic for simplifying field expressions
Mathlib.Tactic.GCongr — gcongr tactic for congruence lemmas
Mathlib.Tactic.Continuity — continuity tactic for continuity goals
Mathlib.Tactic.FunProp — fun_prop tactic for function properties
Mathlib.Tactic.TFAE — tfae_have/tfae_finish for equivalence chains
Mathlib.Tactic.Finset — finset tactics
Mathlib.Tactic.Ext — ext tactic for extensionality
Mathlib.Tactic.Use — use tactic for existentials
Mathlib.Tactic.WLOG — wlog tactic for without-loss-of-generality arguments
Mathlib.Algebra.Group — group and monoid structures
Mathlib.Algebra.Ring — ring structures and homomorphisms
Mathlib.Analysis.Calculus — differential calculus (derivatives, Taylor series)
Mathlib.MeasureTheory — measure theory and Lebesgue integration
Mathlib.Topology — topological spaces, continuity, compactness
Mathlib.NumberTheory — primes, Diophantine equations, zeta functions
Mathlib.CategoryTheory — categories, functors, natural transformations
Mathlib.LinearAlgebra — linear maps, matrices, bases
Mathlib.FieldTheory — Galois theory, field extensions
Mathlib.AlgebraicGeometry — schemes, sheaves, algebraic varieties
lake exe cache — fetch precompiled .olean files
lake exe mk_all — regenerate the top-level import file
